# Copilot Behavior Rules

## Execution Style
- Always explain what you are going to do before modifying files
- Prefer minimal and incremental changes
- Do not refactor multiple modules at once

## Validation
- Ensure scripts in /scripts run without errors
- Verify generated assets exist before referencing them

## File Handling
- Never rename files unless explicitly requested
- Respect existing folder structure defined in AGENTS.md

## Code Generation
- Prefer simple, readable Python over complex abstractions
- Avoid adding dependencies unless strictly necessary

## Safety
- If unsure about a change, ask or suggest instead of acting
